title: Barbecue Chicken Salad
description: Smoky barbecue chicken, crisp romaine lettuce, red onion, bell peppers, grilled carrots, and cheddar cheese come together for a fresh, flavorful salad packed with backyard barbecue flavor.

data.summary: Smoky barbecue chicken, crisp romaine lettuce, red onion, bell peppers, grilled carrots, and cheddar cheese come together for a fresh, flavorful salad packed with backyard barbecue flavor.

steps: Wash and chop the romaine lettuce, then place it in a large mixing bowl.
Thinly slice the red onion and bell pepper.
Grill the carrots until tender and lightly charred, then slice into bite-sized pieces.
Cook the chicken until fully cooked and brush generously with barbecue sauce during the final few minutes of cooking.
Allow the chicken to rest for 5 minutes, then slice into strips.
Add the red onion, bell pepper, grilled carrots, and shredded cheddar cheese to the bowl with the romaine lettuce.
Toss the vegetables and cheese until evenly combined.
Top with the sliced barbecue chicken.
Drizzle with your favorite dressing, if desired, and serve immediately.
